name: Gulmarg Gondola
description: One of the highest and longest cable cars in the world, taking visitors up to 3,979 meters on Mt. Apharwat for spectacular skiing and panoramic Himalayan views.
history: Gulmarg, meaning 'Meadow of Flowers', was a favorite resort for Emperor Jahangir. The Gondola was built by a French company, Pomagalski.
famousFor: Highest cable car, winter skiing, snow activities.
bestTime: December to mid-April (Snow), May to September (Meadows)
